use_cases: Global search input that expands from a compact icon to a full-width search bar on click
Command palette style search for quick navigation across apps and pages
Floating search dock for header or toolbar search functionality
Minimalist search trigger for clean UI navigation bars
ai_summary: An expanding search dock component that morphs from a compact circular icon button into a full-width glass-morphism search input field with backdrop blur effects. Features smooth spring animations using Framer Motion and supports form submission with customizable placeholder text.
